title: Inventory mangrove and coastal data
outcome: A dated source inventory separating mangrove maps, protection models, and population data.
validation_method: Reviewer checks each source for URL, methodology, grain, and limitations.

title: Map mangrove deforestation trends at sub-national scale
outcome: A sub-national mangrove-change map with deforestation-rate and driver classification.
validation_method: Replicator validates deforestation detection against reference data.
done_condition: Deforestation map with accuracy metrics and replication.

title: Estimate coastal protection service loss from mangrove deforestation
outcome: A coastal-protection loss map linking deforestation to storm-surge attenuation reduction.
validation_method: Replicator confirms protection-loss methodology and validates against flood records.
done_condition: Protection-loss map with methodology and replication.

title: Red-team misuse of coastal protection data
validation_method: Mitigations confirmed or publication blocked, then replicated.

title: Check whether outputs match coastal planning needs
validation_method: Field reviewer identifies decision, user, misuse risk, replicated.
done_condition: Named user, named decision, non-use cases.
